Enumeration Case# kUSBPowerDuringWake

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.6+

```
kUSBPowerDuringWake = 1
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbpowerrequesttypes/kusbpowerduringwake#discussion)

The power is to be used while the system is awake (i.e not sleeping)
